bugs.error_message: Horizontal sidebar resize not mirrored when sidebarSide=right
bugs.root_cause: handleMouseMove used e.clientX as new width unconditionally; clientX is distance from viewport left, which only matches the sidebar width when the sidebar is anchored at the left edge. With sidebarSide=right, the resize handle sits at viewport.right - width, so dragging the handle left should grow the sidebar, but clientX shrinking made the sidebar shrink instead.
bugs.fix: Threaded side: "left" | "right" parameter into useResizableSidebar; compute newW = side === "left" ? e.clientX : window.innerWidth - e.clientX. GenericDataViewPage passes theme.sidebarSide ?? "left".

bugs.error_message: L5 binding cards for VehicleView all showed file:null while VehicleTypeView/DeckPlanView resolved correctly
bugs.root_cause: pushBinding() resolved import paths relative to view.abs, but the import lives in the sibling viewConfig file. For VehicleView the viewConfig sits one folder deeper (src/data/vehicles/projection/), so the relative spec landed on a non-existent path. For VehicleTypeView/DeckPlanView the viewConfig sits at the same depth as the view, so the bug was invisible.
bugs.fix: Thread the abs path of the file that owns the importMap (sf) through pushBinding as a new fromAbs param. Sites pass: A→view.abs, B→cfgAbs, C→hop-file abs, D→view.abs.

bugs.error_message: Structural slots EditorComponent and detailsChildren rendered "not detected in any view" while their L5 bindings clearly listed views
bugs.root_cause: deriveWidgetUsage only scans view+viewConfig files for declared property names. EditorComponent is set inside setEditingItem({...}) in a hook one hop away; detailsChildren is a JSX child of GenericDetailsPage, not a property. Token scan misses both.
bugs.fix: After computing bindings, union binding viewIds into usedBy in gen-arch-metafile.mjs widgets map. Bindings are ground truth for slots filled outside view/config files.
Rewrote 4→8 lines (2 removed) | Also: Existing `transportMode.*` keys cover all 14 modes; one **new** key is required for #23:
